description:
The issues plugin's projection key on task.external is 'github-issues' (hyphen) — fixed by PROJECTION_PREFIX in config.rs and the deserialization paths. Several prose mentions still use the underscore form 'github_issues' inherited from earlier drafts:

- README.md (workspace): the table row describing the issues plugin says 'task.external.github_issues.*'.
- crates/balls-plugin-github-issues/README.md: 'Why two binaries' section still references 'task.external.github_issues.*'.
- A few docstring comments in src/ may still spell it with an underscore.

The code is fine — only docs drift. Audit and normalize to 'github-issues' (hyphen) so anyone grep'ing for the key in docs finds matching code.

ACCEPTANCE:
- grep -rn 'github_issues' across the repo returns no docs hits (or only intentional ones).
- Code paths unchanged.
title: Docs: normalize projection key spelling to 'github-issues' (hyphen)
